attacking_style: Aggressive across all terrains with preference for controlled solo moves 1-6km from finish. Pogačar-era tactics favor neutralizing competition through sustained pace before late attacks rather than explosive long-range moves.
team_tactics: Dominant race control from 100km+ out when protecting leaders, but shows coordination gaps with multiple GC riders. Willingly shares/abandons pace when no immediate threat. Unusual willingness to reverse domestique hierarchy (using strong riders as final pacers).
terrain_preference: Rolling classics terrain and moderate gradients where sustained power dominates. Struggles badly on extreme gradients (23%+ ramps). Sprint train exists but vulnerable to physical intimidation and lacks finishing power against top-tier sprinters.
vulnerability: Extreme gradient pitches (Angliru collapse), coordination with multiple co-leaders, sprint train susceptible to being bullied physically. Occasionally caught tactically napping with leaders dropped unexpectedly early in stages.
key_patterns: Race control initiated 100km+ out when protecting leaders, systematic neutralization before planned attacks (3 instances)
Stage wins prioritized over jersey defense; willing to chase threats even abandoning GC protection (2 instances)
Sprint train positioned well but lacks raw power and vulnerable to physical aggression (3 instances)
Pogačar operates without traditional leadout; solo attacks sufficient when strongest rider present (2 instances)
Multiple GC leaders create coordination problems; numerical advantage doesn't translate to tactical cohesion (2 instances)
Complete collapse on 23%+ extreme gradients; Ayuso/team went backwards on Angliru early
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 shows continued dominance in stage races and classics (Amstel control, Paris-Nice aggression) but exposed coordination issues with multiple leaders at Vuelta and vulnerability on extreme gradients persists
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 16
2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 17
2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 8
